description: Phase 1-2: Setup publishing set and select conversation for ingestion

root_files.title: Check Ingestion Status
root_files.content:
# Step 1: Check Current Status

Use: `status()`

This shows:
- Active publishing set (if any)
- Active conversation (if any)
- Current phase
- What needs to happen next

If no publishing set is active, proceed to Step 2.
If publishing set is active but no conversation selected, skip to Step 4.

root_files.title: List or Create Publishing Set
root_files.content:
# Step 2: Publishing Set Management

## Check existing sets:
Use: `list_publishing_sets()`

## Create new set if needed:
Use: `create_publishing_set(name, conversations)`

Example:
```
create_publishing_set(
  name="december_2024_batch",
  conversations=["halo-shield", "soseeh-deep-dive", "sanctuary-patterns"]
)
```

Publishing sets group conversations that will be processed together through Phases 5-8.

root_files.title: Activate Publishing Set
root_files.content:
# Step 3: Activate Publishing Set

Use: `set_publishing_set(name)`

This makes the publishing set your active working context.

**IMPORTANT**: You cannot work on conversations without an active publishing set.

After activation, the set tracks:
- Which conversations are complete (Phase 5)
- Publishing set phase (5→6→7→8)
- Delivery status

root_files.title: Select Conversation to Ingest
root_files.content:
# Step 4: Select Conversation

## List available conversations:
Use: `list_available_conversations()`

This shows conversations in the active publishing set that are NOT yet at Phase 5.

## Select one to work on:
Use: `set_conversation(name)`

Example: `set_conversation("halo-shield")`

**SETUP COMPLETE**: You are now ready to begin tagging.

Next flight: `ingestion_tagging_flight_config`
